headline_seed: Why is Orange County chemical tank crisis so hard to fix? - Los Angeles Times
draft_text:
#BreakingMews A pressurized tank holding ~7,000 gal of methyl methacrylate at GKN Aerospace in Garden Grove may leak or explode. 40,000 residents evacuated. CBS News and CNN report cooling efforts brought the tank to 61°F; target is 50°F.

And that's the mews.
